name: content-quote
title: Content Quote
description: A content section pairing a media panel with body copy and a pull quote, installed as a wired Payload block.

preview.summary: A media panel beside body copy and a cited pull quote.

sampleContent.title: The ecosystem brings together your models.

paragraphs.text: Payload is more than just the CMS. It supports an entire ecosystem — from the products you ship to the platforms helping your team move faster.

sampleContent.quote: Using Payload Components has been like unlocking a design superpower — the perfect fusion of simplicity and versatility.
